live.busNotStartedHint: The bus will appear here once the driver starts the trip.

route.notStarted: Bus has not started. ETAs shown when trip begins.

alerts.heading: Trip alerts
alerts.empty: No alerts yet. They'll appear here once the bus starts a trip.

history.heading: Trip history
history.noBus: No bus assigned to your child yet.

profile.signOutMessage: You will be signed out of SafeRide.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: We will email you a data export within 30 days, then permanently delete your account and all personal data. This cannot be undone.

auth.signInCaption: Sign in to see your child's bus.
auth.missingFieldsMessage: Please enter your email and password.
auth.enterEmailMessage: Type your email address above, then tap Forgot password.
auth.emailSentMessage: Check your inbox for a password reset link.
auth.welcomeHint: For parents, drivers, and transport managers.

onboarding.heading: Your school hasn't added you yet.
onboarding.body: Ask your school's transport manager to register your child. Once they do, sign out and sign back in — your account will be ready automatically.

permissions.title: Before we begin
permissions.subtitle: SafeRide needs a couple of permissions to keep children safe. We only use them as described below.
permissions.notificationsDescParent: We'll alert you when the bus departs, is 10 minutes away, and when your child arrives safely.
permissions.notificationsDescDriver: Receive trip assignments and school communications.
permissions.locationDesc: Your live position is shared with parents only during an active trip. It is never tracked outside a trip.
permissions.finePrint: You can change these at any time in your device settings. SafeRide complies with India's DPDP Act 2023 — your data is never sold.
permissions.skipButton: Not now — I'll do this in settings

boarding.noStudents: No students assigned to this bus.
boarding.errorBoarding: Could not update boarding status. Try again.

driver.signOutMessage: You will be signed out of SafeRide.
driver.noAssignment: No bus or route assigned yet. Contact your transport manager.
